summary: Comprehensive testing of GAAIUS AI major upgrades completed successfully. All requested features verified: Build page renamed to 'GAAIUS AI Builder' with simplified AI chat + preview layout (✅), File mode replaced with Document Studio promotion page (✅), Document Studio (/documents) fully functional with complete interface (✅), Audio generation supports both story creation and simple narration (✅). Backend APIs 88.9% success rate. Frontend features working excellently with minor UI interaction issues.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 520 error - HuggingFace TTS service unavailable
flaky_endpoints.impact: Text-to-speech not working, but audio/generate works fine

minor_issues.issue: Test login failed with non-existent account (expected behavior)

ui_bugs.issue: Send button not easily found in chat interface

passed_tests: Build page - shows 'GAAIUS AI Builder' header
Build page - simplified layout with AI chat on left, preview on right
Build page - modern website preview with Tailwind CSS and gradients
Build page - Download and Save buttons present and functional
File mode landing - shows Document Studio promotion page
File mode - 'Open Document Studio' button navigation works
Document Studio (/documents) - full interface with all 10 document types sidebar
Document Studio - AI chat panel for document creation
Document Studio - document preview panel with placeholder
Document Studio - Create/Files tabs working properly
Audio generation - story creation (e.g., 'tell me a story about 3 dogs')
Audio generation - simple narration of typed text
Navigation - can navigate from Document Studio back to main app
Backend health check - all AI services available (Groq, HuggingFace)
User registration and authentication working
Chat functionality with Groq Llama 3.3 70B
Image generation with Pollinations AI
File generation with Groq
Audio narration generation with multi-language support
Session management (create/list/delete)
Projects API (create/list)
Build full project generation
Payment configuration endpoint
action_item_for_main_agent: Excellent implementation! All major requested features are working perfectly. Only minor items: (1) Consider improving Document Studio send button visibility, (2) TTS endpoint has HuggingFace service issues but audio/generate works fine as alternative. The GAAIUS AI major upgrades are successfully implemented and fully functional.
